description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure depicted mid-stride, as if walking along a sidewalk or street. She wears a fitted, knee-length dress with short sleeves and a prominent white collar, giving her a formal or business-like appearance. Her shoes are simple flats, and her arms are positioned with one hand raised near her mouth, possibly suggesting she is thinking or speaking. The figure's hair is styled in a voluminous, side-parted bob that frames her face and neck. The overall proportions and features are slightly exaggerated, typical of animated or cartoon representations. The surface finish is smooth and uniform, with no visible textures or accessories beyond the clothing and shoes.
description: A stylized adult woman in a formal dress and flats, walking with one hand near her mouth and a voluminous bob hairstyle. The figure has a smooth, cartoon-like appearance and a business-like outfit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white-collared dress, facial features, and hand raised near the mouth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bob hairstyle, arm position, and the curve of the dress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, hairstyle, and both legs in a walking pose.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm position, and the stride of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted knee-length dress with short sleeves and a prominent collar
attribute_posture: walking with one hand raised near the mouth
attribute_hairstyle: chin-length voluminous bob with side part
